title: Henbrandt 6 x Mini Water Pistols 11cm Kids Toys Summer Fun Paddling Pool Garden Party Water Gun Pocket Money Toy Outdoor Game Party Favour Loot Bag Fillers for Boys and Girls
features: Pack of 6 Mini Water Pistols for children.
These mini water pistols are ideal for party bag favours, loot bag fillers, classroom rewards and summer fun in gardens and paddling pools.
Available in 6 neon colours: Blue, Pink, Green, Yellow, Purple and Orange.
Each Mini Water Pistol measures 11cm in length.
description: These small water pistols for kids make ideal party bag fillers, loot bag treats, classroom rewards and pinata prizes during the summer, as well as being great fun as kids garden toys, in paddling pools or at children’s bath time. The small water pistols can also be used for training house pets such as cat training and dog training, to disincentivise leaping on furniture, etc. Available in 6 neon colours: Blue, Pink, Green, Yellow, Purple and Orange. We aim to send a balanced variety of colours, but colours are subject to availability. Pack of 6 Water Pistols per order. Recommended for ages 3+.
